title: DOME Registry Entry Schema
description: JSON Schema for a DOME Registry entry, capturing Data, Optimisation, Model, and Evaluation information for supervised machine learning methods in biology. Version 1.0.0.

metadata.description: Entry-level metadata for the DOME Registry record.

dome_version.description: The version of the DOME schema this entry conforms to.

entry_id.description: Unique identifier for this DOME Registry entry.

created.description: Date the entry was first created (YYYY-MM-DD).

modified.description: Date the entry was last modified (YYYY-MM-DD).

source.description: How the entry was generated: manually by authors, via automated pipeline, or via DOME Copilot.

data.description: D — Information about the training and test data used for the method.

optimisation.description: O — Information about the optimisation strategy and training procedure.

model.description: M — Information about the model architecture, type, and parameters.

evaluation.description: E — Information about model evaluation metrics, protocols, and benchmarks.
